case_title: KIMBERLEY TELMAN VS. SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE OF AESTHETIC &

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TELMAN, KIMBERLEY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE OF AESTHETIC & REGENERATIVE MEDICINE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TELMAN, KIMBERLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE OF AESTHETIC & REGENERATIVE MEDICINE $8,754.18 PRINCIPAL, $120.64 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,099.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
